_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: Conflicting momentum signals and a sideways-with-volatility regime keep us pinned at Anxiety until either Fear & Greed breaks below 25 to confirm a down-move or BTC reclaims $68K with sustained ETF inflows to confirm upside.
next_move.brains_agree: No — the analyst calls HOLD at Anxiety while the narrative writer implicitly leans toward accumulation and upside; the split favors the analyst's higher trust weight and stricter phase anchoring.
next_move.confirmed_if: Fear & Greed drops below 25 AND funding compresses below 0.003% while VIX spikes above 22 (confirms breakdown to Panic) OR BTC breaks $68K with sustained ETF inflows >$500M/day and MVRV Z-score turns positive (confirms breakout to Optimism/Belief).
next_move.invalidated_if: BTC breaks $68K with sustained ETF inflows >$500M/day and MVRV Z-score turns positive, which would invalidate the chop thesis and force a Belief/Optimism reassessment.
